ResearchProjectDef.label: Chinese Standard Uniforms
ResearchProjectDef.description: Research and develop the various uniforms used by the People's Republic of China's civilian and military personnel, ranging from basic jumpsuits to specialized winter gear. These versatile designs emphasize practicality, durability, and adaptability to harsh conditions.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Chinese Advanced Equipment
ResearchProjectDef.description: Research and develop the advanced technology behind Chinese stealth suits and specialized naval equipment. These cutting-edge designs represent the pinnacle of pre-war Chinese engineering, incorporating stealth technology, environmental protection, and enhanced combat capabilities.
